facebook.caption:
5.0 stars. 49 reviews. Zero fluff.

BUM Coffee on 139 Đoàn Thị Điểm is pulling a perfect rating in Phu Quoc, and most tourists haven't even heard of it yet. Small crowd, serious coffee, real atmosphere. This is the kind of café locals actually return to, not just photograph once.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the pour. Watch the faces. BUM Coffee on Đoàn Thị Điểm holds a 5.0 rating and 49 people didn't hand that out for nothing. Your next morning in Phu Quoc, sorted.
